# `liber:log@1`

Generated reference for the `liber:log` package (`log.lsidl`). See [the LSIDL language](../../../LSIDL.md).

LiberSystem log package - structured journal service.

## Imports

- `error` from [`liber:base@1`](/docs/gen/liber/base/v1.md)

## Types

### enum `severity`

Log severity, ordered least to most urgent. The ordinal is the stable wire encoding and matches abi::log::Severity byte for byte.

| case | ordinal | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `trace` | 0 |  |
| `debug` | 1 |  |
| `info` | 2 |  |
| `warn` | 3 |  |
| `error` | 4 |  |
| `fatal` | 5 |  |

### record `field`

One structured key/value pair on a log entry.

| field | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `key` | `string` |  |
| `value` | `string` |  |

### record `entry`

A structured log record. Its binary encoding reproduces the abi::log wire layout byte for byte.

| field | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `timestamp` | `u64` |  |
| `severity` | `severity` |  |
| `source` | `string` |  |
| `fields` | `list<field>` |  |

### record `query`

A query over the journal. `boot` selects a previous boot's on-disk journal (1 = the oldest kept); absent means the live in-memory journal of this boot.

| field | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `since` | `option<u64>` |  |
| `min-severity` | `option<severity>` |  |
| `source` | `option<string>` |  |
| `boot` | `option<u32>` |  |
| `limit` | `u32` |  |

## Interfaces

### interface `log`

The Log service contract.

Request `[op u16][corr u32][args]`, reply `[corr u32][result]`.

| op | method | signature | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | `emit` | `emit(e: entry) -> result<unit, error>` |  |
| 2 | `query` | `query(q: query) -> result<list<entry>, error>` |  |
| 3 | `tail` | `tail(q: query) -> stream<entry>` |  |
